name: Peanut Butter Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the peanut butter and syrup together in a small bowl until well blended.
2. Add the milk to the mixture.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap or a lid.
4. Refrigerate for several hours, ideally overnight, until serving time.
5. Serve over fresh fruit and fruit salads.
Makes about 1 1/3 cups.
